title: COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE PORTLAND COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and delivers used furniture and household items. Available items vary, depending on inventory. The warehouse can typically offer sofas, dining tables, chairs, mattresses, box springs, dishes, cookware, small appliances, linens (including sheets, blankets, and pillows), and other miscellaneous household goods. 3969 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: By referral only. Low-income individuals or families seeking essential household furnishings. Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (503) 235-8786 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 235-8786 Portland Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: A referral from an agency partner is necessary to schedule an appointment. Visit website for a list of participating agencies, which includes local social services agencies. Families with children in public grade school or Head Start should speak with the school's social worker about a possible referral. FEES: $150 Furniture Bank fee for all furniture selected at the time of the appointment. Additional $250 for delivery service. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, French, Arabic, Somali AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Parking available on south side of building. TriMet bus lines 6, 24, and 44. Services: Bedding/Linen Furniture Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE PORTLAND
